steps.title: Read line g from the graph
steps.content:
Two clearly marked points on line $g$ are $(-10, 12)$ and $(0, 1)$.

Slope $= \frac{12 - 1}{-10 - 0} = \frac{11}{-10} = -\frac{11}{10}$

So line $g$ has equation $y = -\frac{11}{10}x + 1$.

steps.title: Write line g in standard form
Find the scalar multiplier
steps.content:
The system $165x + py = w$ must be a scalar multiple of $11x + 10y = 10$ for infinitely many solutions.

Find $n$ such that $n \cdot 11 = 165$:
$$n = 15$$
